title: MCP use-case hierarchy planning closeout
body: Closed claim d8adedf0-5337-4cca-a28e-dae0fead7711 after adding the owner-clarified use-case hierarchy: Oak MCP server primarily supports teachers/end users exploring and using curriculum; engineering/product-builder workflows are important but secondary, with the SDK as the more direct surface. Edited docs passed markdownlint, Prettier, and git diff --check.
